body:
# Discontinued
## For further development and updates, I have moved to LMaG 
Click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lmag) to take a look!

# Create mod with RPG elements.
Enjoy the middle ground of modding, nothing too crazy, nothing just vanilla

## Fitted with magic and automation

With a mix of different world generation and new structures, give your Minecraft a new feel and look with this modpack that allows for automation while you're out exploring the new world and forming bonds with the villager interactions of MCA Reborn. Start off small and build your own base safe from the tornadoes and thick thunder storms, take over a mage's magical tower and create your own spell book, or dig your way out of an ancient city with your new findings.

This mod pack has a focus on automation and exploration, adding spells, and a variety of armaments to guide you through all the realms of minecraft.
